# voxagent

> Voice-powered terminal agent. Fully offline.

voxagent is a command-line tool that captures your voice, transcribes it locally with whisper.cpp, sends it to a local Ollama LLM, and prints the response. Nothing leaves your machine.

## Install

```
npm install -g voxagent
```

## Requirements

- Node.js 18+
- Ollama running locally (https://ollama.com)
- A microphone

First run downloads a whisper model (~150 MB), cached locally for future use.

## Usage

```
voxagent                  # Start voice agent (default model: llama3.2)
voxagent --model mistral  # Use a different Ollama model
voxagent --debug          # Show audio levels and raw whisper output
```

## How it works

1. decibri captures microphone audio as PCM
2. whisper.cpp transcribes speech to text locally
3. Ollama generates a response from your local LLM

Every step runs on your machine. No cloud, no API keys, no network calls.

## Links

- Website: https://voxagent.run
- GitHub: https://github.com/analyticsinmotion/voxagent
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/voxagent
